title: Elaphoglossum liaisianum
taxonomy: Elaphoglossum liaisianum is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Elaphoglossum, which is a group of epiphytic ferns. The classification of Elaphoglossum liaisianum is within the kingdom Plantae, phylum Pteridophyta, and class Polypodiopsida. The family Dryopteridaceae is a group of ferns that are characterized by having leathery fronds. This classification is based on the plant's physical characteristics and its evolutionary relationships.
